75257.subject: Your Wirex account gets an upgrade, here's what to expect
75257.body:
Some
features will be restricted. Here's exactly what stays
open   wirex logo

*****************************************************************
Your
Wirex account enters a new state tomorrow, 1
July
*****************************************************************

Dear
Oleh,

From tomorrow, 1 July, your Wirex account moves into a partial
restriction as part of our transition to Wirex One. Some external
services will be restricted, but a lot stays open, and upgrading
to Wirex One restores
everything.

What
still works from tomorrow:

* Your
card continues to work, spending from your fiat balance as normal
* SEPA in and out, fiat deposits and withdrawals remain open
* Managing your existing products and positions
* Your X-tras subscription stays active until the end of your
paid period
What
changes from tomorrow:

* External
crypto deposits and withdrawals will be closed
* Your card becomes fiat-only, crypto accounts will be unlinked
* Cryptoback™ pauses, no new rewards calculated or credited
* New X-tras upgrades and renewals blocked
* Active Multiply deals may be force-closed today (30
June)
You
still have time, but we recommend upgrading
today.

On Wirex One,
everything comes back, and
more:

* 💸
Up to 8% cashback valued in USD, paid instantly
* 📊 Up to 9.75% APY on stablecoins and crypto
* 🔒 True asset ownership, your keys, your control
* 🌍 24/7 tokenised equity, AMZN, TSLA, MSTR, and
more

Upgrade before tomorrow →  
( http://ablinks.mail.wirexapp.com/ls/click?upn=u001.RWpbXTBdbM7AYqhhWePNGV5a-2F7-2BJ6Ozm-2F6JZatwVgmQX2BLFwi-2BTa4hlo9xy3A0Nf66OtH8OQSTKni6fFe0BLQ-3D-3DvjjP_mTOA-2BX07kQ2Ojbv-2BRbqdnpNrlwyNnm2KPByKJ9Ex4L0S4JfjF4X2-2F0TE3hlWIdDO9pi0f4FxBCZE-2BgXFyasJumTTPTE2L0eUaDJGJ4jPXp90pAhkGb4RYzgFzbkYj7Zr9bAvX5GNqa1nVA9sU36waF9JQieB2YJvOswWs2nzbdj66TDYulkIStA4T7JHpxMiDuc5NQbksXBQlt0jfGI-2FQk3tDNoENLGUJiuaBHTh-2FVf2l32duYuL3agN56zz9ZkiBvNRodYzsZ9CzG0O-2BTD7-2FZdz6Ppemj6UXarlSlaK5WCqCJkBYHKJ-2FoDWNGCJsrq6aBiTBOBCCo22haVgJvpca6DELVVNLsJQ2uGmGDry7rU1E5vYaTUbKnThOeuoozJi2PnRMd8wflch199xMkQYg-2BZ-2Bc9gYC8imgtlrYHrzUZKl0Od9iIdzrjE5wjT7Q6ZCJtKgPW2e6XtM-2FXdkvFANXBakOSYzIbrJUszgI1zBPUNikATo7QatpJndrnbDPkiSzebp7xPIMtF7wMEiYM1e1HMKrlqnx-2Fl57reA1ziHuO3iYSRDTyJ4QeMqYqTStXIbXZPirmegEOIin9nGW7FUMTK29i-2BKPsQZINt9IJZDWBXIIidFFI1B455qQSeCbh3rwRQkZp4kRNzyy9iq6kl2B7GXl2PPB5S5ZGtI6yVbT9zSRdtC1diSRUF-2FsUcmqzj84RMTtb6SnHhhIlwDNFlYrTSTaApJRnzzBQkZTaD7Og5u7zPXtbkt3tcAZilAeYgN )

*****************************************************************
✅ Your account
is safe, here's what transfers
over
*****************************************************************

We
know switching platforms can feel like a big step. Here's what
you need to know:

* Your
identity is already verified, no re-KYC, no extra steps
* Your cards carry over with the same card number, expiry, and
CVV
* Your IBAN and bank details stay the same, incoming transfers
continue as normal
* Your balances transfer automatically
*

75256.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
75256.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/3984b4dc7231193fbaf225b40bf3c09d4fbaa2ff/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

75254.subject: 📉 Strategy's plan sends Bitcoin below 59K
75254.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $58,924 (-2.5%) | **ETH** $1,571 (-0.8%) | **SOL** $73 (0.0%)

* Strategy reveals Digital Credit Capital Framework which allows for the [sale of $1.25B BTC](https://x.com/saylor/status/2071565162377568377?s=20) and $1B repurchase of class A stock — Increases STRC [dividend to 12%](https://www.strategy.com/press/strategy-announces-digital-credit-capital-framework_06-29-2026)

* Robinhood launches [Trump accounts](https://x.com/RobinhoodApp/status/2071685116984955007?s=20) — Trump admin discusses[ SpaceX stock donations](https://www.semafor.com/article/06/29/2026/spacex-us-government-discuss-stock-donation-for-trump-accounts)

* Nasdaq 100 closes [up 2.3%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2071688917221265898?s=20)

* SharonAI Holdings [gains 10%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/SHAZ/) after market close as Situational Awareness discloses [10% stake](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2071687278364401818?s=20)

* US Government launches small [local AI model](https://x.com/AlexFinn/status/2071732462225371592?s=20) that protects local privacy

* Ansem [airdrops his ANSEM token](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2071755661160202578?s=20) with just 7 wallets receiving a total of $7M

* Bitcoin ETFs see [$231M in net outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2071834314137026960?s=20)

* Phantom disclosures page reveals World XYZ as issuer of [tokenized events contracts](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2071697547052072975?s=20)

* Ukraine transfers $8.3M USDT to create [national crypto reserve](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2071627888764305556?s=20)

* Yen hits [40-year low](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2071903964178645390?s=20)

* Meta reveals [brain-to-text](https://decrypt.co/372338/meta-brain2qwerty-ai-brain-activity-text) translation using AI

* OpenAI teases[ Codex branded hardware](https://x.com/9to5mac/status/2071650028024676531?s=20)

* [California partners](https://decrypt.co/372301/california-strikes-deal-anthropic-bring-claude-ai-state-agencies) with Anthropic to bring Claude to state agencies

———————————————————————————


———

75242.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @import url(https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Roboto:300,400,500,700); @import url(https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Ubuntu:300,400,500,700); @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light dark; supported-color-schemes: light dark; } .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; padding-bottom: 20px; } .main-title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Trebuchet MS', Roboto, Ubuntu, sans-serif; font-size: 36px; line-height: 44px; font-weight: 590; color: #000 !important; } .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; } [data-ogsc] .square-btn a { background-color: #010101 !important; color: #F5F5F5 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-title, .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark ) { .main-container { background-color: #000 !important; } .square-btn a { background-color: #F5F5F5 !important; color: #010101 !important; } .main-title, .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #FEFEFE !important; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 500px) { div.main-container > table > tbody > tr > td { padding-left: 20px !important;
